text:
When I'm installing on to my scsi disk, sysinstall reports a TOTALY 
bogus geometry as I enter the partion table.  It then displays the
correct one on the screen.  Then when I go to use the entire disk
(dedicated) it resets the geometry to 1/1/1 and will not all me
to set the partion bootable.

Fix: 

????
How-To-Repeat: ????
